General.Name: Rici Healthcare Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Rici Healthcare Holdings Limited operates as an investment holding company that operates general hospitals, medical examination centers, medical laboratories, and clinics in the People's Republic of China. It also offers health counselling, maternity and child nursing, diagnosis, and examination services. In addition, the company sells medical equipment. Rici Healthcare Holdings Limited was founded in 2000 and is based in Admiralty, Hong Kong.

1.Name: Ms. Xiaoying  Lin
1.Title: COO, Executive VP, GM of Human Resources Center & Executive Director

3.Name: Mr. Haoze  Fang
3.Title: Executive VP, GM of Medical Examination Business Department & Executive Director
